data.description: RUSSIA HAS FULLY BLOCKED TELEGRAM NATIONWIDE, SEVERING ACCESS ACROSS MOBILE AND FIXED NETWORKS. USERS REPORT FAILURE RATES OF UP TO 95%, WITH THE APP LARGELY INACCESSIBLE WITHOUT VPNS.
WALL STREET BANKS TRY OUT ANTHROPIC’S MYTHOS AS US URGES TESTS

data.title: Distinguished 12-Lawyer Insurance Recovery Group Joins Barnes & Thornburg and Propels the Firm's Strategic Growth
data.description: The expansion of a firm's national platform in New Jersey, New York, Philadelphia, and Atlanta has been strengthened with the inclusion of a prominent insurance recovery group. The addition of this highly regarded 12-lawyer team enhances the firm's capabilities significantly. This development, announced on April 10, 2026, in New York and New Jersey, marks a strategic move to elevate the firm's presence and services across key locations, emphasizing growth and specialization in insurance recovery services across the region.

data.title: Vera Therapeutics reveals stock options for new hires under Nasdaq rule 5635(c)(4).
data.description: Authorities reported that a new record number of COVID-19 cases were confirmed today, with 10,000 new infections and 150 deaths recorded in the last 24 hours. This marks the highest daily increase in cases since the pandemic began. The total number of confirmed cases now stands at 250,000, with 3,000 deaths nationwide. Health officials are urging the public to adhere to safety guidelines to prevent further spread of the virus.

data.title: Arqit Quantum Inc. Announces Select Preliminary Financial Results for the First Half of Fiscal Year 2026
data.description: In London on April 10, 2026, Arqit Quantum Inc. (Nasdaq: ARQQ, ARQQW) disclosed preliminary financial information for the first half of fiscal year 2026. Arqit, known for its expertise in quantum-safe encryption, shared select details about its financial performance during this period.

data.title: The Children’s Place Reports Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2025 Results
data.description: Operating cash flows experienced a significant increase of $126 million in Fiscal Year 2025 compared to Fiscal Year 2024. This improvement demonstrates a positive trend in the company's financial performance, reflecting better operational efficiency and management of cash resources.

data.title: NOG Publishes 2025 ESG Report
data.description: In Minneapolis today, Northern Oil and Gas, Inc. (NYSE: NOG) unveiled its Environmental, Social, and Governance (ESG) Report for the fiscal year ending on December 31, 2025. The report, which is accessible on the company's website in the Sustainability section along with previous year reports, featured key highlights. These include an evaluation of their cybersecurity program against the NIST 2.0 framework conducted by an external third-party, as well as an examination of climate-related risks and hazards.

data.title: Delek US Holdings to Host First Quarter 2026 Conference Call on April 29th
data.description: In Brentwood, Tennessee, Delek US Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: DK) revealed its plan to release a press statement detailing its first-quarter 2026 performance before the U.S. stock market commences on April 29, 2026. The company is set to hold a conference call at 9:00 a.m. CT (10:00 a.m. ET) on the same day to delve into these results. Interested parties can tune in to the live broadcast of the conference call on www.DelekUS.com.

data.title: Delek Logistics Partners, LP to Host First Quarter 2026 Conference Call on April 29th
data.description: Delek Logistics Partners, LP (NYSE: DKL) based in Brentwood, Tenn., is set to release its first-quarter 2026 results before the U.S. stock market opens on Wednesday, April 29, 2026. A conference call to review these results will commence at 11:30 a.m. CT (12:30 p.m. ET) on the same day. The call will be broadcasted live online at www.DelekLogi. Stay tuned for detailed financial insights from the company.

data.title: Pentagon challenges court rulings on press restrictions, says they are unconstitutional.
data.description: The Defense Department has submitted a formal notice indicating its plans to challenge the federal judge's recent decisions deeming its press constraints as unconstitutional.

data.title: Aardvark Therapeutics (AARD) Faces Investor Scrutiny Amid 56% Drop On Clinical Pause For Lead Drug Candidate- Hagens Berman
data.description: In San Francisco, on April 10, 2026, it was reported that Aardvark Therapeutics (NASDAQ: AARD) faced a significant setback on March 2, 2026. Investors witnessed a sharp decline in share prices by $7.02, marking a 56% decrease. This plunge came following the company's decision to halt the Phase 3 Hunger Elimination of Reduction Objective ("HERO") trial. The trial was aimed at evaluating the efficacy of the company's product.

data.title: abrdn Global Income Fund, Inc. (FCO) Announces Adjournment of Special Shareholder Meeting Relating to Proposed Reorganization
data.description: On April 10, 2026, abrdn Global Income Fund, Inc. (NYSE American: FCO) disclosed that its Special Meeting of Shareholders took place but was adjourned the same day. This adjournment was necessary to secure more proxies and meet the minimum quorum requirement. The Fund has scheduled a new...

data.title: BNBuilders Completes CSU Dominguez Hills Orthotics & Prosthetics Education Center
data.description: A collaboration between BNBuilders and AC Martin has resulted in the completion of the Orthotics & Prosthetics Maker Studio at California State University, Dominguez Hills on April 10, 2026. This new facility provides a specialized, hands-on learning environment for students on campus.

data.title: Rithm Capital Corp. Schedules First Quarter 2026 Earnings Release and Conference Call
data.description: Rithm Capital Corp. (NYSE: RITM) revealed its plans to disclose its financial results for the first quarter of 2026, concluding on March 31, 2026, on Tuesday, April 28, 2026, before the commencement of the New York Stock Exchange. Management is scheduled to conduct a conference call on the same day at 8:00 a.m. Eastern Time. For interested parties, an earnings release copy will be available on the Investors - Events & Presentations segment.

data.title: Fastenal Company Announces Cash Dividend and Share Repurchase Activity
data.description: Fastenal Company (Nasdaq:FAST) based in Winona, Minnesota, announced that its board of directors approved a cash dividend of $0.24 per share for shareholders. This dividend will be paid on May 26, 2026, to shareholders of record as of April 28, 2026. Fastenal has a history of dividend payments, starting with annual dividends in 1991, semi-annual dividends in 2003, and quarterly dividends in 2011. All dollar amounts mentioned are in millions, with the current dividend being $0.24 per share.

data.title: Blackstone Digital Infrastructure Trust Announces Public Filing of Registration Statement with the SEC
data.description: Blackstone Digital Infrastructure Trust Inc., a recently established organization specializing in acquiring and holding stable, newly-built data centers, disclosed the submission of a registration statement on Form S-11 to the Securities and Exchange Commission for a potential initial public offering of its common stock. The offering's execution hinges on market circumstances and other factors, such as the registration statement's approval by the SEC.

data.title: FINANCIAL LITERACY MONTH ALERT: FINAL COMPETITION FOR THE LARGEST-EVER JA MIAMI COMPANY PROGRAM
data.description: During Financial Literacy Month in April 10, 2026, Junior Achievement Miami will host an event with a keynote speaker, Ivan Soto-Wright, who is both the CEO and Founder of MoonPay and a Board Member of Junior Achievement Miami. The event aims to celebrate their record-breaking year and educate attendees on financial literacy. Ivan Soto-Wright, the CEO of MoonPay, will share insights alongside his role in the Soto-Wright Foundation.
Federal Reserve Board announces approval of application by Burke & Herbert Financial Services Corp.

data.title: Scorpio Tankers Inc. Announces Closing of Convertible Senior Notes due 2031 and Concurrent Stock Repurchase
data.description: Scorpio Tankers Inc. has successfully completed its private offering, raising $375,000,000 through the sale of convertible senior notes due 2031. The offering, conducted under Rule 144A of the Securities Act of 1933, saw an additional $50,000,000 in notes purchased by initial buyers. Alongside this transaction, the Company bought back 1,344,809 common shares at a price of $74.36 per share.

data.title: Missouri Flooring Solutions Explained In HelloNation Featuring Flooring Expert Nick Hopkins
data.description: A recent report discusses the impact of climate conditions on flooring decisions, particularly emphasizing the most suitable materials for homes in Missouri. In Festus, Missouri, on April 10, 2026, it was highlighted that homeowners need to consider the state's significant climate fluctuations when selecting flooring. HelloNation suggests adapting flooring choices to accommodate Missouri's varying climate conditions for optimal performance.
